zh.Defford, Worcestershire, England: 英國武斯特斯爾德福德
zh.Swallowfield, Wiltshire, England: 英國維爾爾斯瓦洛雷費爾德
zh.lifeSummary: 當Sir William Despenser於1263年出生在英國武斯特斯爾德福德時，他的父親Sir John le Despenser28歲，母親Anne de Lou28歲。他於大約1275年與Joan Margaret Cobham在英國武斯特斯爾結婚。他們至少是1個兒子的父母。他去世於1328年在他的家鄉享年65歲，埋葬在英國武斯特斯爾德福德。

zh-hans.Defford, Worcestershire, England: 英国武斯特斯爾德福德
zh-hans.Swallowfield, Wiltshire, England: 英国維爾爾斯瓦洛雷費爾德
zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Sir William Despenser于1263年出生在英国武斯特斯爾德福德时，他的父亲Sir John le Despenser28岁，母亲Anne de Lou28岁。他于大约1275年与Joan Margaret Cobham在英国武斯特斯爾结婚。他们至少是1个儿子的父母。他去世于1328年在他的家乡享年65岁，埋葬在英国武斯特斯爾德福德。

nameMeanings.name: William
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Probably the most successful of all the Old French names of Germanic origin that were introduced to England by the Normans. It is derived from Germanic wil ‘will, desire’ + helm ‘helmet, protection’. The fact that it was borne by the Conqueror himself does not seem to have inhibited its favour with the ‘conquered’ population: in the first century after the Conquest it was the commonest male name of all, and not only among the Normans. In the later Middle Ages it was overtaken by John , but continued to run second to that name until the 20th century, when the picture became more fragmented.

historicEvents.title: Jews Expelled From England
historicEvents.description: After years of anti-Semitic behavior, King Edward I expelled Jews from England in 1290.

historicEvents.title: Famine Strikes Europe
historicEvents.description: A famine caused by cold winters and wet summers across Europe caused millions to die due to starvation. Desperation from hunger caused high levels of crime, stampedes in bread lines in London, infanticide, and even cannibalism throughout Europe.

historicEvents.title: First War of Scottish Independence
historicEvents.description: The First War of Scottish Independence began after England invaded Scotland in 1296. The Treaty of Edinburgh was signed in 1328 which declared peace between the two kingdoms and brought the war to an end.

en.lifeSummary: When Sir William Despenser was born in 1263, in Defford, Worcestershire, England, his father, Sir John le Despenser, was 28 and his mother, Anne de Lou, was 28. He married Joan Margaret Cobham about 1275, in Worcestershire, England. They were the parents of at least 1 son. He died in 1328, in his hometown, at the age of 65, and was buried in Defford, Worcestershire, England.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Sir William Despenser est né en 1263, à Defford, Worcestershire, Angleterre, son père, Sir John le Despenser, avait 28 ans et sa mère, Anne de Lou, avait 28 ans. Il a épousé Joan Margaret Cobham environ 1275, à Worcestershire, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils. Il est décédé en 1328, dans sa ville natale, à l’âge de 65 ans, et a été enterré à Defford, Worcestershire, Angleterre.

de.lifeSummary: Als Sir William Despenser 1263 in Defford, Worcestershire, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater Sir John le Despenser 28 und seine Mutter Anne de Lou 28. Er hat um 1275 in Worcestershire, England Joan Margaret Cobham geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Sohn. Er starb 1328 im Alter von 65 Jahren in seinem Geburtsort und wurde in Defford, Worcestershire, England begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Sir William Despenser è nato il nel 1263 nel Defford, Worcestershire, England, il suo padre, Sir John le Despenser, aveva 28 anni e il suo madre, Anne de Lou, aveva 28 anni. Lui sposato Joan Margaret Cobham circa 1275, nel Worcestershire, England. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlio. Morì nel 1328, nel sua cittadina, all'età di 65 anni, e fu sepolto a Defford, Worcestershire, England.

ja.lifeSummary: Sir William Despenserが1263年にイギリスウオルセステルシュアイアデフォードで生まれた時，父Sir John le Despenserは28歳，母Anne de Louは28歳であった。約1275年にイギリスウオルセステルシュアイアでJoan Margaret Cobhamと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の息子の親であった。彼は1328年に故郷で65歳で死去し，イギリスウオルセステルシュアイアデフォードにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Sir William Despenser(이)가 1263년 영국 워스스터실르 데퍼드에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Sir John le Despenser(은)는 28세였고, 그의 어머니 Anne de Lou(은)는 28세였다. 그는 대략 1275년 영국 워스스터실르에서 Joan Margaret Cobham(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들을 두었다. 그는 1328년 그의 고향에서 65세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 워스스터실르 데퍼드에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Sir William Despenser nasceu em 1263, em Defford, Worcestershire, Inglaterra, seu pai, Sir John le Despenser, tinha 28 anos e sua mãe, Anne de Lou, tinha 28 anos. Ele casou-se com Joan Margaret Cobham aproximadamente 1275, em Worcestershire, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filho. Ele faleceu em 1328, em sua cidade natal, com 65 anos, e foi sepultado em Defford, Worcestershire, Inglaterra.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Sir William Despenser родился в 1263 г. в местности деффорд, ворсестиршир, Англия, его отцу по имени Sir John le Despenser было 28 лет, а матери, которую звали Anne de Lou, 28. Он женился на женщине по имени Joan Margaret Cobham около 1275 г. в местности ворсестиршир, Англия. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын. Он умер в 1328 г. в его родном городе в возрасте 65 лет и был похоронен в местности деффорд, ворсестиршир, Англия.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Sir William Despenser nació en 1263, en Defford, Worcestershire, Inglaterra, su papá, Sir John le Despenser, tenía 28 años y su mamá, Anne de Lou, tenía 28 años. Se casó con Joan Margaret Cobham aproximadamente 1275, en Worcestershire, Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 1 hijo. Murió en 1328, en su pueblo, a la edad de 65 años, y fue sepultado en Defford, Worcestershire, Inglaterra.
